arts.ttl: I saw Ruben Amorim conversation that could lead to new Manchester United training ground plan
arts.sum: Man Utd suffered a second successive defeat as they were beaten 3-2 by Nottingham Forest in a chaotic game at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest star casts verdict on Andre Onana howler as Amad given new Man United title
arts.sum: Manchester United were left with a lot to chew over after recording their sixth defeat to their Premier League campaign vs Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Morgan Gibbs-White makes Andre Onana admission after Man United howler vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Morgan Gibbs-White left Man United goalkeeper Andre Onana with egg on his face after scoring Nottingham Forest's second goal in Saturday's 3-2 win at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's words fall on deaf ears as Man Utd stars ignore 'mad dog' demand
arts.sum: MAN UTD 2-3 NOTTINGHAM FOREST: Ruben Amorim tasted defeat for the first time at Old Trafford, showing the Portuguese how big of a challenge he faces to turn the Red Devils around

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives honest Andre Onana verdict after costly error in Man Utd defeat
arts.sum: Despite a lifeline strike from Bruno Fernandes, Manchester United slipped to a second successive defeat under Ruben Amorim, but the new coach said Andre Onana was not to blame despite a costly mistake

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim slammed for tactical error which cost Man Utd in Nottingham Forest defeat
arts.sum: Manchester United fans were left baffled when Ruben Amorim withdrew Bruno Fernandes for Mason Mount in the 76th minute despite the team seeking an equaliser at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand's immediate one-word reaction as Nottingham Forest beat Manchester United
Gary Neville slams Man United for 'being outrun every single week' and reveals the lesson they could learn from Chelsea as Rio Ferdinand brands defeat to Nottingham Forest a 'shambles'
arts.sum: Gary Neville has criticised Manchester United for 'being outrun every single week'. Ruben Amorim's side suffered a second successive defeat as they were beaten 3-2 at home to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Brennan Johnson and Chris Wood wowed by one Nottingham Forest player vs Man United
arts.sum: Nice to see Cafu pop up...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes plea to Man United fans after falling to a second defeat in just four days with 3-2 loss at home to Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT OLD TRAFFORD: Ruben Amorim has called on Manchester United fans to trust the process after his side fell to back-to-back defeats in the space of a week.
